summary: Game Tile Live Blacked Out Hide Spoilers ON
description:
GIVEN TTS is turned ON
AND the user is logged in
AND Hide Spoilers is turned ON
AND a Blacked Out Live game is on the schedule
AND the user is on the Home page

steps.action: WHEN focus is assigned to a Blacked Out Live game in the Hero
steps.result: THEN the following statement is spoken, "Live, Blacked Out, <away_team> at <home_team>. Press select to play game. Move down to browse more content."
